event: The choice of a bride by Tsar Alexis of Russia
symbols: elevated platform or dais — the tsar's elevated authority and power to choose among the candidates
richly dressed women in a line — the tradition of bride-shows, the selection of a consort for the ruler
ornate palatial interior — the wealth and ceremony of the Russian imperial court
description: A richly detailed interior scene in what appears to be a Russian palace hall with elaborately decorated walls and columns. A group of young women in magnificent brocade gowns and ornate headdresses stand in a line, facing toward a raised area on the right where a single female figure stands apart, perhaps already chosen or being presented. At the far left, additional courtiers and attendants watch the proceedings. The women's garments are heavily embroidered in gold, red, white, and blue. The lighting is warm and golden, illuminating the rich fabrics and the jeweled ornaments.

_meta.title: The choice of a bride by Alexis of Russia
